title: $SUPPRESS_FORM_FEED
text: $SUPPRESS_FORM_FEED Remove extra form feed from the end of print output. $SUPPRESS_FORM_FEED Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description The $SUPPRESS_FORM_FEED setting prevents Uniface from printing an extra form feed at the end of a printout. An extra form feed can result in an extra blank page at the end of the printed output. If you omit the $SUPPRESS_FORM_FEED setting, the default behavior is to print an extra form feed.
